message:
feat(conformance): add FFT differentiation tests and update lockfile

- Add crates/fsci-conformance/tests/diff_fft.rs: comprehensive test suite for
  FFT differentiation correctness, validating forward and inverse transforms
  against reference implementations.

- Update Cargo.lock to include the fsci-fft dependency added in the previous
  commit (9a324a4), keeping the lockfile in sync with the workspace manifest.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
